problem id: a316aadc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01001100 -> 00001110
  11001110 -> 00100101
  00100100 -> 00101111
  10101111 -> 10110001
  11111010 -> 10110101
  10110110 -> 01000101
  01111100 -> 11001110
  00001011 -> 01100011
  00010000 -> 10111111

query: 01100010
predicted answer: 01010110
